curriculum.title: Advanced Algebra
curriculum.summary: Manipulate expressions, identities, and parameterized equations.

curriculum.title: Functions and Transformations
curriculum.summary: Composition, inverse thinking, and graph transformations.

curriculum.title: Polynomials and Roots
curriculum.summary: Factor structure, Vieta-style reasoning, and root patterns.

curriculum.title: Trigonometric Geometry
curriculum.summary: Trig ratios, angle relationships, and contest triangles.

curriculum.title: Analytic Geometry
curriculum.summary: Coordinate methods, distance, midpoint, and slope relations.

curriculum.title: Combinatorics and Probability
curriculum.summary: Permutations, combinations, conditional probability, and strategy.

curriculum.title: Sequences and Series
curriculum.summary: Closed forms, recurrences, and telescoping-style ideas.

curriculum.title: Inequalities and Systems
curriculum.summary: Inequality logic, interval intersections, and multi-condition systems.

curriculum.title: Logarithms and Exponents
curriculum.summary: Growth laws, log manipulation, and exponential equations.

curriculum.title: Modular Number Theory
curriculum.summary: Remainders, modular classes, divisibility, and parity.

curriculum.title: Proof Logic and Invariants
curriculum.summary: Invariants, extremal reasoning, contradiction, and elimination.

curriculum.title: Optimization and Modeling
curriculum.summary: Max/min structure, modeling, and efficient contest decision-making.
